name: Eastern Burger
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ground pork and seasonings.
2. Shape into 4 burgers, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Place the burgers over moderately hot coals in a kettle-style grill.
4. Grill for 5 minutes on one side, then turn the burgers and continue grilling for an additional 4-5 minutes on the other side.
5. Serve immediately on sandwich buns if desired.
Cuisine: Asian
Source: National Pork Producers Council
